title: Spousal Support & SAID Income Impact
description: Evidence detailing the interaction between requested spousal support and the Saskatchewan Assured Income for Disability (SAID) benefits.
legalMemo:
## Tactical Synthesis: Disability Support & Income

Under Saskatchewan family law, the interplay between spousal support and SAID benefits requires careful documentation. The attached evidence demonstrates the absolute necessity of maintaining medical support without triggering provincial clawbacks from the SAID program.

title: Failure to Accommodate Medical Needs
description: Communications showing deliberate disregard or failure to accommodate documented disability needs during custody exchanges.
legalMemo:
## Tactical Synthesis: Medical Accommodation

Preliminary analysis reveals a pattern of non-accommodation regarding the petitioner's documented disability (contrary to Saskatchewan Human Rights Code principles) during court-mandated transition times.
